name: @kiwe/ai-toolkit
description: AI toolkit for creating Kiwe website, AppShell theme, and combined handoffs without reading the full plugin codebase.

scripts.test: node --check bin/kiwe.js && node --check lib/kiwe-core.js && node --check lib/binding-validator.js && node --check lib/bricks-conversion-validator.js && node --check lib/apply-planner.js && node --check lib/framework-profile-validator.js && node --check mcp/index.js && node -e "import('./lib/kiwe-core.js').then(m=>{const bad=m.diagnoseCommand({command:'/buid /preview /brickstheme'}); const noop=m.diagnoseCommand({command:'/create /preview /website', artifactSummary:'website/bricks-paste.html exists'}); const ok=m.diagnoseCommand({command:'/convert /bricks', artifactSummary:'website/bricks-paste.html exists'}); if(!bad.stop || bad.code!=='unknown_command_token' || !noop.stop || noop.status!=='noop' || ok.stop) process.exit(1);})" && node bin/kiwe.js workflow > tmp/workflow-smoke.md && node bin/kiwe.js diagnose --command "/create /preview /brickstheme" > tmp/diagnose-invalid-preview-smoke.json && node bin/kiwe.js route --command "/rebuild /seamframework" --brief "Smoke" > tmp/route-smoke.md && node bin/kiwe.js route --command "/create /preview /dsatheme" --brief "Smoke" > tmp/route-theme-preview-smoke.md && node bin/kiwe.js route --command "/create /preview /combined" --brief "Smoke" > tmp/route-combined-preview-smoke.md && node bin/kiwe.js route --command "/convert /bricks" --brief "Smoke" --artifact-summary "website/bricks-paste.html exists" > tmp/route-bricks-smoke.md && node tools/validate-output.cjs --help && node tools/audit-output.cjs --help && node tools/validate-bindings.cjs --help && node tools/validate-bricks-conversion.cjs --help && node tools/prepare-apply-plan.cjs --help && node tools/validate-framework-profile.cjs --help && node tools/validate-bindings.cjs fixtures/bindings-valid --site-graph fixtures/bindings-valid/site-graph.json && node tools/validate-bricks-conversion.cjs fixtures/bricks-conversion-valid --site-graph fixtures/bricks-conversion-valid/site-graph.json && node tools/prepare-apply-plan.cjs fixtures/bindings-valid --site-graph fixtures/bindings-valid/site-graph.json && node tools/validate-framework-profile.cjs fixtures/framework-profile-valid
